exp_006 discard smoothed terminal/customer fraud rates, IQR-based amount anomaly, terminal fraud trend (7d/28d ratio), customer fraud rate, interaction feature (zscore*term_fraud_rate) 0.1479 0.0627 0.7458 0.6622 0.0776 0.0001 37

exp_009 discard LightGBM (CPU) with good regularization: num_leaves=63, min_child_samples=30, reg_alpha=0.5, reg_lambda=2.0, LR=0.03 — compare to XGBoost SOTA 0.0750 0.0262 0.6999 0.6132 0.0402 0.0000 35

exp_011 discard add: IQR-based amount anomaly (continuous), is_very_large_for_cust (p95), hour deviation from customer's typical pattern, terminal amount z-score — stronger scenario 1+3 signals 0.1889 0.0990 0.7842 0.6983 0.0972 0.0000 39
exp_012 discard model tuning: deeper model (max_depth=6), lighter regularization (min_child_weight=15, reg_alpha=0.3), more trees (2000) — same features as exp_008 SOTA 0.1975 0.0973 0.7797 0.6790 0.1029 0.0000 33

exp_014 discard XGBoost: max_depth=5, min_child_weight=25, reg_alpha=0.8, reg_lambda=2.5, gamma=0.15, LR=0.025 — intermediate regularization between SOTA and exp_013 0.2405 0.1220 0.7914 0.6829 0.1230 — 35

exp_018 discard max_depth=4 (same as exp_013 that got OOT=0.211) with slightly softer regularization (min_child_weight=20, reg_alpha=0.5, gamma=0.05) to push val above threshold 0.2954 0.2112 0.7982 0.6877 0.1504 — 35
exp_019 KEEP ensemble: 2 XGBoost models (max_depth=4, seeds 42+123) averaged — variance reduction should push composite above SOTA threshold 0.3522 0.2441 0.7978 0.6997 0.1788 0.0000 35

exp_021 discard 4-model ensemble: depth=4, seeds=[42,123,256,789] — more seed diversity for better variance reduction 0.1665 0.1027 0.7805 0.6965 0.0874 0.0001 35
exp_022 discard add cust_terminal_diversity (unique_terminals/total_txns) for scenario 3 — card-not-present customers visit many different terminals; 2-model ensemble SOTA 0.1764 0.1060 0.7764 0.6820 0.0919 0.0000 36
exp_023 discard confirm 2-model ensemble SOTA reproducibility with exp_019 features — stability check 0.3522 0.2441 0.7978 0.6997 0.1788 0.0000 35
exp_024 discard 2-model ensemble (seeds 42+123, depth=4) with slightly higher subsample/colsample (0.80 vs 0.75) — less variance in tree construction 0.3429 0.2323 0.7979 0.6999 0.1742 — 35
exp_025 discard 2-model ensemble with colsample_bylevel=0.75 for more node-level randomness — may improve OOT generalization 0.3438 0.2372 0.7862 0.6592 0.1746 0.0000 35

fraud-sim

add amount distribution shape: card_amt_skew, amt_vs_card_q90_ratio, amt_above_card_q90, amt_pct_in_card_range; add is_weekend time feature
Experiments: 21
Kept: 6
Discarded: 15
Best AUPRC (val): 0.6710
Best AUPRC (OOT): 0.6912
Baseline (OOT): 0.4985
Improvement: +38.7%

OOT		 AUROC

OOT		 Composite

exp_006 discard ensemble 4 XGBoost seeds (42/123/777/2024), max_depth=6, lr=0.04, min_child_weight=10, L1/L2 regularization 0.6222 0.5911 0.9829 0.9818 0.3745 0.0001 41
exp_007 KEEP per-card-category amount zscore, card-level night/weekend ratio, off-peak-block detection, card_cat_txn_count 0.6625 0.6904 0.9749 0.9768 0.3920 0.0001 44

exp_009 discard interaction target encoding: category x hour_block (4 blocks), category x day_of_week, merchant x hour_block — captures time-of-day fraud patterns per category 0.6706 0.6880 0.9731 0.9763 0.3944 0.0001 51
exp_010 discard per-card home location (median lat/long), typical merchant distance, geo_dist_zscore vs card's usual distance, is_unusually_far flag 0.6617 0.6858 0.9736 0.9767 0.3836 0.0001 54
exp_011 discard behavioral depth: per-card amount CV, range, p10 ratio, category entropy/diversity, merchant diversity, state/city diversity 0.6667 0.6917 0.9764 0.9777 0.3913 0.0001 60
exp_012 discard model tuning: max_depth=6, lr=0.03, min_child_weight=10, gamma=0.2, L2=2.0 — stronger regularization for better OOT generalization 0.6492 0.6472 0.9794 0.9793 0.3949 0.0001 50
exp_013 discard city population features: log_city_pop, city_pop_zscore, is_small_city, is_rural, city_pop_ratio vs card home city 0.6617 0.6858 0.9736 0.9767 0.3836 0.0001 56
exp_014 KEEP add amount distribution shape: card_amt_skew, amt_vs_card_q90_ratio, amt_above_card_q90, amt_pct_in_card_range; add is_weekend time feature 0.6710 0.6889 0.9740 0.9772 0.3985 0.0001 52

exp_020 discard per-card behavioral Mahalanobis anomaly: distance from each card's OWN behavioral centroid (log_amt + hour), not the global centroid; card_ba_mahalanobis, card_ba_amt_zscore, card_ba_hour_zscore 0.6840 0.7004 0.9755 0.9760 0.3885 0.0001 55

ieee-cis

model depth=8, lr=0.015, 3000 trees, stronger regularization (reg_lambda=2.0, gamma=0.2, min_child_weight=15) for richer feature set
Experiments: 14
Kept: 8
Discarded: 5
Best AUPRC (val): 0.3091
Best AUPRC (OOT): 0.2086
Baseline (OOT): 0.1785
Improvement: +16.9%

OOT		 AUROC

exp_005 KEEP add D-column recency signals (zscore + is_high), entity sharing (fraud ring: addr1/email/card4/6 sharing counts), D1 per-card deviation, addr1xDeviceType interaction TE 0.2641 0.1712 0.8270 0.7823 0.1584 0.0056 44

● val (green line) = drives keep/discard  |  ◆ OOT (sky blue, one per experiment) = held-out generalization  |  Plots and data regenerated after each experiment.
